courses.title: Guitar
courses.description: Explore the rich tones of acoustic and electric guitars while learning strumming patterns, chords, and melody crafting essential for generating expressive guitar-driven music.

courses.title: Piano
courses.description: Understand piano scales, chord progressions, and harmony structures to help your AI system create warm, emotional, and dynamic piano-based compositions.

courses.title: Drum Sets
courses.description: Learn how different instruments blend in professional compositions, including sound layering, mixing, and mastering to enhance AI-generated music quality.

courses.title: Electronic Dance Music Production
courses.description: Study synthesizers, drum machines, and electronic instruments to teach your AI how to produce energetic beats and modern EDM soundscapes.

courses.title: Electronic Music
courses.description: Explore synthesizers, digital sound design, and rhythmic patterns that help AI generate energetic electronic tracks with modern textures and driving beats.

courses.title: Jazz Improvisation
courses.description: Learn the expressive nature of jazz chords, swing rhythms, and improvisation techniques that enable AI to produce soulful, smooth, and highly dynamic jazz pieces.

courses.title: Rock Music Essentials
courses.description: Understand aggressive guitar riffs, punchy drum patterns, and powerful vocal styles to train AI models in generating bold and energetic rock compositions.

courses.title: Classical Music Theory
courses.description: Discover orchestration, harmony, and the structure of classical compositions so your AI can create elegant, emotional, and deeply layered symphonic music.
